title: Trimble Launches First Industry Dwell Time Metrics for Fleet Management
text: Metrics Help Improve Delivery, Scheduling and Driver Utilization WESTMINSTER, Colo. , March 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that Trimble Fleet Manager, provided as part of its Mobility telematics portfolio, is now the first back-office fleet management solution to offer industry-specific average dwell time metrics.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Construction Prospects With Latest Deal
text: Trimble (TRMB) joins ResponsibleSteel to address the need for minimizing carbon emissions in the steel industry with its construction portfolio.

title: Trimble Joins ResponsibleSteel to Further Sustainability Efforts in the Steel Industry
text: First Software Technology Provider to Join Industry Organization  WESTMINSTER, Colo. , March 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that it has joined ResponsibleSteel, an independent, non-profit organization that is the steel industry's first global multi-stakeholder standard and certification initiative.

title: 14 Stocks' Amazing Rallies This Year Are Now Completely Gone
text: Nothing lasts forever. At least that's the lesson for S&P 500 stock investors this year as big gains slip away.

title: Trimble's (TRMB) Latest Move Boosts Construction Offerings
text: Trimble (TRMB) unveils Tekla Structures 2023, Tekla Structural Designer 2023, Tekla Tedds 2023 and Tekla PowerFab 2023 to strengthen its Tekla software.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Construction Business With New Software
text: Trimble (TRMB) extends its Siteworks Software capabilities with the new Siteworks Machine Guidance Module.

title: How Meraki Co-Founders Hit The Jackpot Again With Samsara
text: After hitting it big with Meraki, Sanjit Bitwas and John Bicket cofounded Samsara, which now has a market valuation over $10 billion. The post How Meraki Co-Founders Hit The Jackpot Again With Samsara appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Tekla 2023 Structural BIM Software Raises the Bar for Automated and Connected Workflows Across Projects
text: Optimizing Resources for Sustainable Construction WESTMINSTER, Colo. , March 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the introduction of the latest versions of its Tekla® software for constructible Building Information Modeling (BIM), structural engineering and steel fabrication management.

title: Trimble Introduces an All-In-One System for On-Machine Excavator Guidance and Site Surveying
text: LAS VEGAS , March 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today the Trimble® Siteworks Machine Guidance Module, extending the capabilities of Trimble Siteworks Software from surveying and layout to support on-machine excavator guidance and operator assistance. With the addition of the new software module, contractors can use the same rugged Site Positioning Systems hardware and software to perform a variety of tasks on the job site, including surveying, machine guidance, in-field design and reporting.

title: Trimble Study Shows Automated Compaction Delivers Substantial Cost, Labor and Sustainability Gains
text: Horizontal Steering Control for Soil Compaction Delivers 26 Percent Savings of Both Carbon and Fuel During Field Testing LAS VEGAS , March 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that in field testing, horizontal steering control on a soil compactor delivers demonstrable savings in cost, labor and environmental impact. The goal of the Trimble study was to quantify the impact of horizontal steering control on compaction overlap and its relationship to overall carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions.

title: Why Is Trimble (TRMB) Down 13.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Trimble (TRMB) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Trimble's (TRMB) Clientele Grows With National Highway Contract
text: National Highway extends its contract with Trimble (TRMB) for the latter's AgileAssets cloud software.

title: England's National Highways Extends Its Contract for Trimble's AgileAssets Cloud Software for Bridge Asset Management
text: Decision-Support Solution Helps Transportation Leaders Understand the Future Needs of their Highway Structure Assets WESTMINSTER, Colo. , March 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that National Highways, the government-owned company that manages the motorways and major A roads of England, has extended its contract for Trimble's AgileAssets cloud software.
